summary: 8 hand-authored cross-project novel commands: secrets where-name/rotation, functions inventory, branches drift, projects estate, auth-admin lookup/recent, pgrst schema, storage usage.
reason: Supabase's Management API is project-scoped; cross-project rollups are the highest-leverage value-add this CLI offers over supabase-js and the dashboard. These read from the local SQLite store (populated by sync) for offline cross-project queries, with auth-admin / pgrst / storage hitting live project APIs through a shared project_surface.go helper that resolves the three-credential model (PAT, publishable, service_role). Spec-level patches (server URL, x-mcp orchestration, x-auth-env-vars, stub security schemes for upstream-undefined fga_permissions/oauth2 refs) were applied to spec.json pre-generation; they don't show up as source patches because the generator consumed them upstream.
